message:
bench: update benchmark results after WASM32 division fix

All runtimes now return correct values for division operations.
Average benchmark shows 499999.5 on Binary, AOT, WASM, and Bun.

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 | Runtime | Time |
 |:---|---:|
-| EdgeBox (Binary) | 11175.8ms |
-| EdgeBox (AOT) | 16805.2ms |
-| EdgeBox (WASM) | 60828.6ms |
-| Bun | 525.6ms |
-| Node.js | 913.0ms |
+| EdgeBox (Binary) | 647.2ms |
+| EdgeBox (AOT) | 25069.5ms |
+| EdgeBox (WASM) | 62359.1ms |
+| Bun | 569.6ms |
+| Node.js | 943.7ms |

-| `Node.js` | 33.9 ± 1.2 | 31.9 | 35.7 | 5.76 ± 0.59 |
+| `EdgeBox (Binary)` | 9.6 ± 7.7 | 4.6 | 28.8 | 1.00 |

+| `Bun` | 16.0 ± 2.2 | 14.2 | 20.6 | 1.67 ± 1.36 |
+| `Node.js` | 40.1 ± 4.6 | 34.7 | 47.2 | 4.19 ± 3.40 |
